mapLinks.label: Day 1–2 Map — Iceland — Reykjanes, Geysir & South Coast

sections.heading: Day 1 — Golden Circle + South Coast Waterfalls
items: Pick up Iceland car at KEF · depart ~10:30am
Drive 45 min → Kerið Crater — red volcanic walls, vivid aquamarine lake · walk the rim + descend to lake edge · 12:15pm arrive (~45 min · ISK 600)
Drive 15 min → Lunch in Selfoss — Kaffi Krús or Almar Bakari · 1:15pm (~45 min)
Drive 35 min → Geysir — Strokkur erupts every 5–10 min · watch 2–3 eruptions and leave · 2:45pm (~45 min)
⚠️ Gullfoss optional (10 min from Geysir) — Iceland's most powerful two-tier waterfall · add 45 min if energy allows · 3:45pm
Drive 45 min south → Urriðafoss — Iceland's most voluminous waterfall · 2 min off Route 1 · ground trembles from the force · almost nobody here · 5:30pm (~20 min · free)
Drive 15 min → Seljalandsfoss — walk behind the falls · bring waterproofs! · 6:15pm (~1hr)
Gljúfrabúi — hidden canyon waterfall 5 min walk from Seljalandsfoss · most tour buses skip it · genuinely magical (~30 min)
Drive 20 min → Skógafoss — climb the 527 steps for the top view · evening light is spectacular · 8:15pm (~45 min)
Drive 15 min east → Reynisfjara black sand beach — basalt columns, Reynisdrangar sea stacks · stunning in evening light · (~25 min)
Drive 10 min → Vík village — red-roofed church viewpoint · quick stop (~15 min)
Drive 10 min east → Room in Skeidflot, Skeidflot 871 — check in ~9:30pm · hosted by Arnar · Airbnb ✅

sections.heading: Day 2 — South Coast Full Push
items: Leave Skeidflot 7:00am — already deep on the South Coast, 10km from Dyrhólaey
Dyrhólaey arch — clifftop viewpoint over black sand coast and sea arch · puffins nesting on Lágey islet in June · head to the lower road for the arch · arrive before 8am · (~30 min)
Drive 45 min east → Fjaðrárgljúfur Canyon — 100m deep moss-covered canyon · Game of Thrones Season 8 Episode 1 dragon flight location · ISK 1000 Parka fee · walk the full rim (~1.5hrs)
Lunch in Kirkjubæjarklaustur — 10 min from canyon · quick stop ~30 min

Drive 30 min east → Svínafellsjökull Glacier — 2km side road off Ring Road · 15–20 min walk to viewpoint · deep blue glacial ice + jagged black peaks · Game of Thrones S7 + Interstellar filming location · ⚠️ viewpoint only (rockfall risk advisory) · free · ~45 min total
Drive 1hr east → Jökulsárlón Glacier Lagoon — floating blue icebergs at the edge of Vatnajökull · walk the lagoon shore · seals basking on the ice · truly otherworldly · (~45 min)
Cross the road → Diamond Beach — ice diamonds scattered across jet-black volcanic sand · every piece unique · constantly changing with the tides · free · (~30 min)
Drive ~2hrs west back along Ring Road → BergOne, Ytri-Njarðvík · check in ~5:00pm ✅
Evening 6:30pm: drive 20 min → Reykjanes Peninsula golden hour — Reykjanesviti lighthouse + Bridge Between Continents · 24hr June daylight · spectacular late light
Early night — 5:15am alarm tomorrow for KEF

tags.text: ⏰ Set alarm 5:15am Jun 22 — drive ~45 min to KEF
🐦 Puffins at Dyrhólaey — head to lower Lágey area · most active before 10am in June
💳 Parka app needed: Fjaðrárgljúfur ISK 1000
✓ Room in Skeidflot · Night 1 · Airbnb · $290.36
✓ BergOne · Night 2 · Booking.com · $263.98

summary.highlights: Kerið · Geysir · Seljalandsfoss · Skógafoss · Reynisfjara · Svínafellsjökull · Jökulsárlón Glacier Lagoon · Diamond Beach · Dyrhólaey

mapLinks.label: Day 3 Map — Fly → Lake Thun → Diemtigtal

items: Return Iceland car at KEF · board 7:20am FI568

Land ZRH 1:05pm · clear Non-Schengen → Schengen passport control · pick up Hertz rental car at Arrivals Hall desk · Conf. L5350959316 · Jeep Compass or similar · allow 60–90 min for immigration + car pickup
Depart ZRH ~2:30–3:00pm · drive south toward Bernese Oberland

Drive ~1hr → Lake Thun (Thunersee) viewpoint near Spiez — pull off on Route 6 for the classic Eiger/Mönch/Jungfrau framed by turquoise lake · medieval Spiez Castle on the waterfront worth a quick 15 min stop · no entry needed for the exterior · first taste of the Bernese Oberland (~30 min)
Drive 45 min → Tiny House Diemtigtal · check in · arrive ~5:30–6:00pm ✅
Dinner locally or cook in the Tiny House kitchen · early night — big Day 4 tomorrow

Evening ~6:00pm: walk the Grimmimutz Discovery Trail from Oey — family-themed trail through the valley with illustrated markers telling the story of the forest dwarf Grimmimutz and the pepper witch · ~45–60 min · free · starts right at the village

Stroll through Diemtigtal village — traditional wooden chalets · Wakker Prize-winning intact villagescape · largest alpine farming valley in Switzerland · cowbells, wild roses, mountain backdrop · 20 min · free

tags.text: ✓ Tiny House im schönen Diemtigtal · Airbnb · $255.92 · Jun 22–23 · 1 night
🏷 At Hertz: confirm Swiss vignette (CHF 40) included · confirm cross-border approval for Italy + Slovenia · inspect car before leaving
💙 Blausee tickets: buy online at blausee.ch to skip queue · CHF 12 adult / CHF 6 child
⏰ Book Oeschinensee 8:30am slot tonight at oeschinensee.skiperformance.com — fills up fast in summer

summary.highlights: Fly KEF→ZRH · Hertz pickup · Lake Thun viewpoint · Spiez Castle · Grimmimutz Discovery Trail · Diemtigtal village stroll

days.title: Oeschinensee + Grindelwald First — Double Gondola Day
days.meta: Jun 23 · Diemtigtal → Kandersteg (Oeschinensee) → Grindelwald First → Diemtigtal

mapLinks.label: Day 4 Map — Oeschinensee + Grindelwald First — Double Gondola

items: Leave Diemtigtal 8:00am · drive 20 min → Kandersteg
⭐ Oeschinensee gondola 8:30am slot — pre-booked timed entry · turquoise alpine lake at 1,578m enclosed by sheer 2,000m cliffs · ~CHF 35/adult · ⚠️ book slot tonight at oeschinensee.skiperformance.com

🥾 Oeschinensee lake walk — 25 min down to shore from gondola station · panorama trail or direct path · rowing boats available · summer toboggan run at mountain station · ~1.5hrs at lake · gondola down by 10:30am
Drive ~1hr → Grindelwald · park at Firstbahn Talstation · arrive ~11:30am
⭐ Grindelwald Firstbahn gondola #238070 ✅ — ride to First (2,168m) · Eiger directly opposite · spectacular arrival on the ridge
⭐ First Cliff Walk — suspended steel & glass walkway bolted to the sheer cliff face · vertigo-inducing views over the valley · ~30 min · free with gondola ticket
Lunch — Restaurant First on the ridge (~1hr)
🥾 Bachalpsee hike — flat trail from First station to the iconic alpine lake · Eiger/Mönch/Jungfrau reflected in the water · 5km return · ~1.5hrs
Gondola down · drive ~45 min back to Diemtigtal · arrive ~6:30pm
Dinner — Tiny House kitchen or Stärnä Beizli, Oey (~1hr)

tags.text: ⏰ Book Oeschinensee 8:30am slot at oeschinensee.skiperformance.com — fills fast in summer
✅ Grindelwald First gondola #238070 · Jun 23 · 2 adults + 2 children
⏰ Oeschinensee 8:30am slot — book at oeschinensee.skiperformance.com if not already done

summary.highlights: Oeschinensee turquoise lake · Grindelwald First gondola ✅ · First Cliff Walk · Bachalpsee hike

mapLinks.label: Day 5 Map — Lauterbrunnen + Bachalpsee → Munich area

items: Leave Diemtigtal 8:30am · drive 45 min → Lauterbrunnen · park in village
⭐ Lauterbrunnen valley — 72 waterfalls · Staubbach Falls (300m freefall over the village · 15 min walk to base · free) · valley floor stroll (~1hr)
⭐ Trümmelbach Falls (optional) — glacial meltwater thundering through gorge inside the mountain · €12/adult · ~45 min · kids love it
Drive ~3hrs northeast → Munich area · check in · ⏳ hotel yet to book · no place decided
Dinner — Munich (~1hr)

tags.text: 🏰 Ehrenberg + Highline179 combined ticket ~€18/adult · no booking needed · buy on site · opens 9am
🌉 Highline179: 406m suspension bridge · 113m above valley · connects Ehrenberg ruins to Fort Claudia · genuinely thrilling for kids
⚠️  — Neuschwanstein: book NOW at neuschwanstein.de if switching · June sells out months ahead · guided tour only ~€15/adult
✓ Landhaus Lindenberg, Buchloe · Conf. #6026325459 · $202

summary.highlights: Staubbach Falls · Lauterbrunnen valley · drive to Munich area

days.title: Königssee + Obersee + Hintersee + Jenner Summit
days.meta: Jun 25 · Munich → Königssee → Obersee → Hintersee → Jenner → Berchtesgaden

mapLinks.label: Day 6 Map — Königssee + Obersee + Hintersee + Jenner Summit

items: Leave Munich area 8:30am · drive ~2hrs → Königssee dock, Schönau am Königssee · arrive ~9:00am · buy boat tickets at the dock
⭐ Königssee electric boat departs ~9:30am — ride straight to Salet (55 min · do NOT get off at St. Bartholomä yet) · trumpet echo demonstration en route
🥾 Obersee walk — 15 min from Salet to pristine mountain lake · iconic half-submerged boathouse · Röthbach Waterfall (Germany's highest at 470m) towering in the distance · (~45 min return)
Board boat back to St. Bartholomä (20 min) · Lunch — beer garden at the historic hunting lodge restaurant on the lakeside (~1hr)
Final boat back to Königssee Seelände (~35 min) · arrive ~2:00pm

Drive 15 min → Hintersee + Zauberwald (Magic Forest) — crystal-clear turquoise lake · giant moss-covered boulders + ancient trees · 45-min loop trail · free · one of the most romantic spots in Bavaria

Drive 10 min → Jennerbahn valley station, Schönau am Königssee · cable car up to 1,800m · ⭐ Jenner summit hike (1,874m) — 15–20 min from station · 360° panorama · Königssee far below · Eagle's Nest visible across the valley · cable car down ~5:30pm
Drive 10 min → Berchtesgaden · check in hotel · arrive ~6:30pm · ⏳ yet to book
Afternoon rest — explore Berchtesgaden old town · early night · big day tomorrow — Eagle's Nest first bus 8:50am

tags.text: ⊙ Book Königssee boat at seenschifffahrt.de — arrive 9am, depart 9:30am · return to Salet ~€29/adult · €14.50/child
⚠️ Ride boat ALL THE WAY to Salet first — do NOT get off at St. Bartholomä · do St. Bartholomä on the way back
⏰ Early night — Eagle's Nest first bus 8:50am tomorrow · leave hotel 7:30am
⏳ Berchtesgaden / Schönau hotel Jun 25–26 — book now · Hotel Edelweiss / Alpensport-Hotel Seimler

summary.highlights: Königssee electric boat · Obersee + Röthbach Waterfall · St. Bartholomä lunch · Hintersee + Zauberwald · Jenner summit 1,874m

days.title: Eagle's Nest + Liechtensteinklamm → Salzburg + Hohensalzburg → Wolfgangsee → Hallstatt
days.meta: Jun 26 · Berchtesgaden → Eagle's Nest → Liechtensteinklamm → Salzburg → Wolfgangsee → Hallstatt

mapLinks.label: Day 7 Map — Eagle's Nest + Liechtensteinklamm → Salzburg + Hoh

items: Leave Berchtesgaden 7:30am · drive 15 min → Obersalzberg
⭐ Dokumentation Obersalzberg — WWII museum + original bunker tunnels · ~45 min · €10/adult

⭐ Eagle's Nest (Kehlsteinhaus) — bus from Obersalzberg · first bus ~8:50am · elevator through the mountain · 1,834m · 360° panorama · ~1.5hrs · €33/adult · ⚠️ leave by 10:30am — Liechtensteinklamm next
Drive 45 min west → Liechtensteinklamm, St. Johann im Pongau 🇦🇹 · arrive ~11:15am

⭐ Liechtensteinklamm Gorge — deepest gorge in the Alps · 444 stairs up + helix staircase · roaring torrent · massive 50m waterfall at the end · ~2.5hrs · €16/adult · €9/child · packed lunch at gorge café
Drive 45 min north → Salzburg · park Altstadtgarage B · arrive ~3:15pm
⭐ Salzburg quick walk — Getreidegasse · Mozart's birthplace exterior · Residenzplatz · Salzburg Cathedral · ~45 min · ⚠️ Hohensalzburg interior saved for Jun 27 morning

⭐ Hohensalzburg Fortress interior — funicular up · one of Europe's largest and best-preserved medieval fortresses · Golden Chamber · panoramic battlements over Salzburg · ~1hr · €16/adult · ⚠️ leave by 4:45pm to reach Wolfgangsee
Drive 45 min east → Wolfgangsee (St. Gilgen) · arrive ~5:45pm
⭐ Wolfgangsee photo stop — turquoise lake backed by Schafberg mountain · lakefront promenade (~20 min · free)
Drive 30 min south → Hallstatt · arrive ~6:35pm · ⚠️ P1/P2 parking or Obertraun + ferry
⭐ Hallstatt golden hour lakefront — best light of the day · market square · lakeside walk · dinner
Check in Hallstatt / Bad Goisern hotel · ⏳ yet to book · 1 night

tags.text: 💰 Eagle's Nest €33/adult · first bus 8:50am · ⚠️ leave summit by 10:30am sharp
💰 Liechtensteinklamm €16/adult · €9/child · no booking · opens 8am · bring packed lunch
🅿️ Hallstatt: P1 €4/hr · or Obertraun free + ferry (5 min drive + 10 min ferry)
⏳ Hallstatt / Bad Goisern hotel Jun 26–27 — book now · Heritage Hotel Hallstatt / Seehotel Grüner Baum
🏰 Hohensalzburg interior €16/adult · funicular €5 · leave fortress by 4:45pm · last funicular down ~5pm

summary.highlights: Eagle's Nest 1,834m · Liechtensteinklamm 444 stairs · Salzburg old town · Hohensalzburg Fortress interior · Wolfgangsee · Hallstatt golden hour

days.title: Hallstatt Full Day — Gosausee · Salt Mine · Skywalk · Beinhaus · Echern Valley · Dachstein 5 Fingers
days.meta: Jun 27 · Hallstatt — Salt Mine → Skywalk → Beinhaus → Echern Valley → Dachstein 5 Fingers → stay Hallstatt

mapLinks.label: Day 8 Map — Hallstatt Full Day — Gosausee · Salt Mine · Skywal

items: Already in Hallstatt — walk straight out of hotel · no travel time · village wakes slowly before 9am

🥾 Gosausee (Gosau Lake) — drive 20 min from Hallstatt · turquoise lake with the full Dachstein glacier backdrop · flat 4.5km loop trail · mirror reflections of the glacier in morning light · one of the most scenic lake walks in Austria · (~1hr loop · free) · back in Hallstatt by 8:30am

⭐ Hallstatt Salt Mine (Salzwelten) — world's oldest salt mine · wooden mine slide · underground salt lake · ~1.5hrs · €35/adult · book online at salzwelten.at · first entry 9am sharp · arrive counter by 8:45am
⭐ Hallstatt Skywalk viewpoint — 20 min walk up from village · 360° panorama of Hallstatt and the lake far below · best morning light · completely free
⭐ Beinhaus (Bone Chapel) — over 1,200 painted skulls decorated with names, dates and flowers · unique in the world · 10 min walk from market square · small entry fee · eerie and deeply moving
⭐ Hallstatt village walk + lunch — lakefront promenade · Pfarrkirche church · market square · lakeside lunch (~1hr)

🥾 Echern Valley + Waldbachstrub Waterfall — trail starts directly behind the village · no drive · climb into the Dachstein foothills · Waldbachstrub Waterfall (30 min up · thundering cascade) · return (~1.5hrs total)
Drive 15 min → Dachstein Krippenstein cable car, Obertraun · arrive ~2:15pm · ⚠️ pre-book at dachstein.at

⭐ Dachstein 5 Fingers (2,109m) — five glass-floored arms extending over a 400m cliff face · Hallstatt visible far below · one of the most dramatic viewpoints in Austria · ~45 min · ⚠️ Giant Ice Cave closed until Jun 30 — skip ice cave on this visit · cable car down by 4:00pm

📌 Giant Ice Cave (Rieseneishöhle) — noted but closed until Jun 30 2026 · same cable car station as 5 Fingers · massive underground ice formations · guided tour ~1.5hrs · consider if itinerary allows a revisit · check dachstein.at before trip
Drive 15 min → Hallstatt lakefront golden hour — best evening light · dinner lakeside (~1hr)
2nd night Hallstatt · ⏳ extend hotel booking Jun 26–28

tags.text: ⛏ Salt Mine — book at salzwelten.at · €35/adult · first entry 9am · arrive by 8:45am
⛰ Dachstein cable car — pre-book at dachstein.at · last ascent ~5pm · arrive Obertraun by 2:15pm
⏰ Sequence is tight — Salt Mine must be done by 9:30am to fit everything
⏳ Extend Hallstatt hotel to 2 nights Jun 26–28 · Heritage Hotel Hallstatt / Seehotel Grüner Baum

summary.highlights: Gosausee glacier lake loop · Hallstatt Salt Mine · Skywalk 360° · Beinhaus 1,200 painted skulls · Echern Valley + Waldbachstrub · Dachstein 5 Fingers 2,109m · lakefront golden hour

days.title: Grossglockner High Alpine Road → Außervillgraten
days.meta: Jun 28 · Hallstatt → Grossglockner → Kaiser-Franz-Josefs-Höhe → Das Auss.Zeit, Außervillgraten

mapLinks.label: Day 9 Map — Grossglockner High Alpine Road → Außervillgraten

items: Checkout Hallstatt hotel 8:30am · drive ~1hr 15min → Grossglockner Hochalpenstraße entrance at Bruck an der Glocknerstraße
⭐ Grossglockner High Alpine Road — Austria's most famous mountain road · 48km · 36 hairpin bends · €46.50 toll — cash only
⭐ Fuscher Törl (2,428m) — first major high point · Edelweißspitze (2,571m) — short walk to the highest point accessible by car in Austria · 360° panorama · wildflowers in June
⭐ Kaiser-Franz-Josefs-Höhe (2,369m) — direct view of Grossglockner (3,798m) Austria's highest peak · Pasterze Glacier overlook · museum + restaurant · ~1.5hrs
Lunch — restaurant at Kaiser-Franz-Josefs-Höhe (~1hr)
Drive ~1hr south via Heiligenblut + Lienz → Außervillgraten · arrive ~6:00pm
Check in Das Auss.Zeit ✅ · #72072265941383 ⚠️ rebook check-in to Jun 28 · settle in · first evening in the Dolomites
Dinner — Das Auss.Zeit kitchen or local Gasthof in Außervillgraten · early night · Thurntaler summit hike in 2 days

tags.text: 💰 Grossglockner toll €46.50/car — CASH ONLY · pack warm layers at 2,500m even in June
⏰ Aim to enter Grossglockner by 10am for best visibility · road can cloud over by afternoon
⚠️ Rebook Das Auss.Zeit check-in → Jun 28 · #72072265941383 · 3 nights Jun 28–Jul 1

summary.highlights: Grossglockner High Alpine Road · Fuscher Törl · Edelweißspitze 2,571m · Kaiser-Franz-Josefs-Höhe · Pasterze Glacier · arrive Das Auss.Zeit

days.title: Außervillgraten — Oberstalleralm + Winkeltal + Heinfels · OR Lienz Osttirodler
days.meta: Jun 29 · Das Auss.Zeit base · the valley that time forgot · two options · rest before Thurntaler tomorrow

mapLinks.label: Option A Map — Außervillgraten → Winkeltal → Oberstalleralm → Heinfels Castle
Option B Map — Außervillgraten → Oberstalleralm → Lienz Osttirodler

sections.heading: Morning — both options start here
items: Relaxed start — breakfast at Das Auss.Zeit · recover legs after Grossglockner · take in the Villgraten mountain panorama
⭐ Kneipp Nature Path — 2 min walk from the hotel · barefoot water path + Gradieranlage salt-air wall · kids love it · restorative for tired feet · completely free

⭐ Außervillgraten village wander — Baroque chapel · centuries-old farmhouses · genuinely unspoilt Tyrolean village · Kunstgalerie Bachlechner (art gallery with Le Corbusier + others · surprisingly world-class) · ~45 min

sections.heading: Option A — Mellow · Oberstalleralm + Winkeltal + Heinfels Castle
items: Drive 5 min → Winkeltal valley — a secret 12km side valley branching off from the village · untouched landscape of rustic alpine pastures + old larch forests · drive 5km in to Reiterstube restaurant
🥾 Short Winkeltal walk — gentle stroll from Reiterstube deeper into the valley · rushing mountain stream · complete silence · ~30 min · free
Lunch at Reiterstube — Villgrater and Tyrolean specialities · homemade pastries · lamb + game · sun terrace with mountain backdrop · (~1hr) · cash + card
Drive 10 min → end of Villgratental → Unterstalleralm · park here

🥾 Oberstalleralm — 20 min walk up from Unterstalleralm · 18 ancient sun-blackened wooden huts + tiny chapel · first mentioned 1675 · listed building · one of the most photographed authentic spots in all of Austria · looks like a film set · completely free · also: Klapfbachwasserfall viewpoint 10 min further — panorama of the Villgrater mountains
Drive 15 min → Burg Heinfels — 13th-century castle complex towering above the Pustertal valley · newly reopened after years of closure · dramatic hilltop · sweeping valley views · ~45 min
Back at Das Auss.Zeit by 5pm · rest · early dinner · set alarm — Thurntaler summit tomorrow

sections.heading: Option B — Thrills · Oberstalleralm + Lienz Osttirodler Alpine Coaster
items: Drive 10 min → Unterstalleralm · park here
🥾 Oberstalleralm — 20 min walk up · 18 ancient sun-blackened huts + chapel (1675) · most atmospheric spot in East Tyrol · Klapfbachwasserfall viewpoint 10 min further · ~1hr total · free
Drive 30 min → Lienz · Schlossbergbahn funicular up to Moosalm

⭐ Osttirodler Alpine Coaster — one of the longest alpine coasters in the world · 2.7km through forest + hairpin turns + spectacular loops · views of Schloss Bruck + Lienz Dolomites below · riders control their own speed · ~6 min ride · go twice! · Veda + Vaiga will love this
⭐ Moosalm adventure area — petting zoo · adventure playground · largest climbing park in East Tyrol · high-rope course · adventure golf · all on the mountain · (~1.5hrs for the kids)
Lunch/snack at Moosalm Berggasthaus · local Osttiroler food (~1hr)
Funicular back down → drive 30 min → Das Auss.Zeit by 5pm · rest · early dinner · set alarm — Thurntaler summit tomorrow

tags.text: ⭐ Oberstalleralm is non-negotiable — 10min drive + 20min walk · one of the most photographed authentic spots in all of Austria · both options include it
🎢 Osttirodler open daily Jun–Sep · 9:00–16:45 · funicular ticket required · bring cash + card · minimum age/height restrictions apply · lienzer-bergbahnen.at
⏰ Early night essential — Thurntaler summit 2,407m hike tomorrow · aim in bed by 9:30pm

summary.highlights: Außervillgraten village + Kneipp path · Oberstalleralm 18 ancient huts · Option A: Winkeltal + Reiterstube + Heinfels Castle · Option B: Lienz Osttirodler alpine coaster 2.7km + Moosalm adventure park

days.title: Option A: Thurntaler Summit 2,407m  ·  Option B: Helm/Monte Elmo + Tre Cime Preview
days.meta: Jun 30 · Das Auss.Zeit base · choose your adventure · both end with Dolomites views

sections.heading: Option A — The Summit · Thurntaler 2,407m (Strenuous)
items: Leave Das Auss.Zeit 8:00am · drive toll-free mountain road from village → Thurntaler Rast restaurant trailhead · ~15min
🥾 Thurntaler summit hike (2,407m) — Trail 7 from Thurntaler Rast · 600m elevation gain · ~2hrs up · rocky but well-marked · off the tourist radar · village-start hike
⭐ Summit panorama — 360° sweep: Villgrater mountains · Carnic Alps · Hohe Tauern + Grossglockner · AND the Dolomites including Tre Cime visible to the south
Lunch at Thurntaler Rast — Tyrolean food · cash only · sun terrace · ~1hr
Descent ~1.5hrs · back at Das Auss.Zeit by 3:30pm · rest · pack bags for tomorrow
Dinner · early night — big Dolomites day tomorrow

sections.heading: Option B — The Preview · Helm/Monte Elmo Cable Car (Easy, Family-Friendly)
items: Drive 15 min → Sillian · Helm (Monte Elmo) cable car valley station
⭐ Helm cable car up to ~2,000m · panoramic cabin · top station in ~10min

🥾 Hike 45min to Sillianer Hütte (Rifugio Sillianer) — easy ridge walk · direct eye-level view of the Tre Cime from the north · also the Sesto Sundial range of peaks · this is the most dramatic Dolomite panorama accessible this easily anywhere
⭐ Sillianer Hütte lunch — mountain hut with Tre Cime framed in the window · ~1hr · cash
⭐ Olperls Bergwelt adventure park — at the top station · rope bridges · zip lines · kids activities · Veda + Vaiga will love this · ~1hr
Cable car down · drive 15 min → Das Auss.Zeit by 3:30pm · rest · pack bags for tomorrow
Dinner · early night — big Dolomites day tomorrow

mapLinks.label: Option B — Helm/Monte Elmo cable car, Sillian

tags.text: 🥾 Option A: Thurntaler is strenuous (600m gain, 4hrs round trip) — great for strong hikers · village start, no cable car
⭐ Option B: Helm/Monte Elmo is the easier choice — cable car does the climbing · best Tre Cime preview in the area · kids adventure park at top
⏰ Either option: be back by 4pm · early night essential · checkout + big drive tomorrow

summary.highlights: Option A: Thurntaler 2,407m summit · 360° panorama · OR · Option B: Helm/Monte Elmo cable car · Sillianer Hütte · eye-level Tre Cime preview + Olperls Bergwelt kids park

days.title: Seceda + Val di Funes + Lagazuoi + Cortina d'Ampezzo → Dobbiaco
days.meta: Jul 1 · Außervillgraten → Ortisei → Val di Funes → Lagazuoi → Cortina d'Ampezzo → Dobbiaco

mapLinks.label: Day 12 Map — Seceda + Val di Funes + Lagazuoi + Cortina d'Ampez

items: Checkout Das Auss.Zeit by 9:00am · load car · last look at Villgraten valley
Drive 1hr 10min → Ortisei, Val Gardena · park at Parkgarage Seceda · ⚠️ Pre-book Seceda timed slots at seceda.it
⭐ Seceda cable car (Ortisei → Furnes → Seceda) · 15-min ride · €59/adult · arrive 2,519m · most iconic jagged-peak Dolomites view · Fermeda Towers + Sassolungo panorama
🥾 Forcella Pana ridgeline walk — 10 min from top station · Fermeda Towers up close · Sassolungo panorama · ~1hr · easy ridge walk · completely free
Lunch at Rifugio Firenze on the ridge (~1hr) · cable car back down · depart Ortisei ~1:00pm
Drive 30 min → Val di Funes (Santa Maddalena) · park in village · road to church closed to cars
⭐ Santa Maddalena Church viewpoint — 30 min walk up Panoramaweg · tiny stone church in emerald meadow framed by jagged Odle/Geisler peaks · most photographed scene in South Tyrol · (~1hr return)
Drive 1hr → Passo Falzarego
⭐ Lagazuoi cable car (2,752m) — Rifugio Lagazuoi · WWI Galleries (tunnels · helmet + headlamp ~€20) · summit panorama over 8 Dolomite groups · ~1.5hrs · last cable car up ~5pm
Drive 25 min east → Cortina d'Ampezzo · arrive ~5:45pm
⭐ Cortina d'Ampezzo — the most glamorous town in the Dolomites · Corso Italia piazza stroll · Tofane peaks backdrop · best espresso of the trip · ~45 min · free
Drive 35 min east → Dobbiaco (Toblach) · check in hotel · arrive ~7:00pm · ⏳ book now
Dinner — Dobbiaco restaurant (~1hr) · early rest · 5:30am alarm tomorrow for Braies sunrise

tags.text: ⚠️ Pre-book Seceda timed slots at seceda.it — 2026 requires advance booking
⏰ Leave Eagle's Nest Obersalzberg by 10:30am · Lagazuoi last cable car up ~5pm · aim Lagazuoi by 4:15pm
💰 Seceda €59/adult · Lagazuoi ~€20/adult · WWI tunnel guided tour ~€20 extra · helmet + headlamp included

days.title: Lago di Braies Sunrise + Prato Piazza + Cadini + Tre Cime di Lavaredo
days.meta: Jul 2 · Dobbiaco → Braies (sunrise) → Prato Piazza → Cadini di Misurina → Tre Cime → Dobbiaco

mapLinks.label: Day 13 Map — Lago di Braies Sunrise + Prato Piazza + Cadini + T

items: 5:30am alarm · drive 25 min → Lago di Braies · arrive by 6:00am — before gate restrictions (7:30am) · guaranteed parking
⭐ Lago di Braies sunrise — mirror reflections on the emerald-green lake · iconic Dolomite boathouse · one of the most beautiful lakes in Italy · walk the full 3.5km circuit (~1hr)
Drive 20 min → Prato Piazza plateau · arrive ~7:30am · park at Rifugio Prato Piazza

⭐ Prato Piazza — open alpine plateau above the treeline · Tre Cime looming directly ahead · one of the best non-technical Dolomites viewpoints · far fewer visitors than Tre Cime · coffee at Rifugio Prato Piazza · ~1hr easy walk · free
Drive 30 min → Rifugio Auronzo via Misurina · arrive ~9:00am · toll road €30/car · ⚠️ fills by 9am in peak season — arrive early · pre-book at auronzo.it
⭐ Cadini di Misurina viewpoint — 20-min hike from Rifugio Auronzo · the classic Tre Cime postcard shot from above · jaw-dropping · do this BEFORE the main loop
⭐ Tre Cime di Lavaredo loop (6.2mi / 10km) — circumnavigation of the three iconic peaks · Rifugio Locatelli · north face close-up · WWI caves at Sasso di Sesto · ~3.5hrs
Lunch at Rifugio Locatelli or Auronzo (~1hr) · cash only at huts
Drive 30 min back → Dobbiaco · arrive ~4:00pm
Afternoon rest · Dobbiaco village walk · Strudel at a local café · pack bags for Mayrhofen tomorrow
Dinner — Dobbiaco (~1hr) · early night

tags.text: ⏰ Leave Dobbiaco 5:30am — arrive Braies by 6am before 7:30am gate restrictions
💰 Tre Cime toll road €30/car · fills by 9am · arrive early · pre-book at auronzo.it
⏳ Dobbiaco/Sesto hotel · 2nd night

summary.highlights: Lago di Braies 6am sunrise · Prato Piazza plateau + Tre Cime panorama · Cadini di Misurina viewpoint · Tre Cime loop 6.2mi · Rifugio Locatelli

days.title: Val Fiscalina (optional) → Dobbiaco → Olpererhütte + Kebema Bridge → Mayrhofen
days.meta: Jul 3 · Dobbiaco → Mayrhofen → Schlegeis (Olpererhütte) → Mayrhofen overnight

mapLinks.label: Day 14 Map — Außervillgraten → Olpererhütte + Kebema Bridge → M

items: 🌅 Optional morning detour — Val Fiscalina (Fischleintal) · drive 15 min south to Sexten (Sesto) · follow road to end of valley · park at Fischleinboden · Cima Una (2,698m) looms directly above open meadows · often called the most beautiful valley in the world · simply park and look · no hike needed · 30 min total · free · leave by 8:15am to keep schedule
Checkout Dobbiaco hotel 8:45am · goodbye Dolomites · drive ~2hr 15min north via Brenner → Mayrhofen · drop bags · drive 30 min → Schlegeis
Drive ~1hr 45min north → Mayrhofen · drop bags at hotel · drive 30 min → Schlegeis Alpine Road toll (€17 cash) · park at reservoir · arrive ~11:00am
⚠️ Park before 9am if possible — fills fast · or accept parking further down and walk 15 min to trailhead
⭐ Olpererhütte hike (Trail 502) — 3km · 600m elevation gain · ~1.5–2hrs up · rocky ascent through pine forest · views of emerald Schlegeis Stausee growing behind you
⭐ Kebema Suspension Bridge (Olperer Panoramabrücke) — 3–4 min past the hut · appears to float over the reservoir · Austria's most iconic hike photo · ~10 min queue
Lunch at Olpererhütte — Kaiserschmarrn · Schnitzel · cash only · refill water at hut spring (~1hr)
⭐ Giant Swing at Schlegeis base (optional · 31m free fall) · descent ~1hr · back at car ~3:30pm
Drive 30 min back → Mayrhofen · check in hotel · arrive ~4:00pm
Mayrhofen village evening — stroll Hauptstraße · Tyrolean dinner · early night · set alarm 6:30am

tags.text: 💰 €17 cash for Schlegeis toll · no cards at Olpererhütte hut
⏰ Leave Außervillgraten by 8:30am · aim to park Schlegeis by 10:30am
⏳ Book Mayrhofen hotel — 1 night · Neuhaus Zillertal / Hotel Strass / Bachmayerhof

summary.highlights: Optional Val Fiscalina · Cima Una meadows · Dobbiaco checkout · Olpererhütte 600m hike · Kebema suspension bridge · Giant Swing · Mayrhofen

days.title: Seebensee + Drachensee → Rhine Falls → Schaffhausen → ZRH
days.meta: Jul 4 · Mayrhofen → Ehrwald (Seebensee/Drachensee) → Rhine Falls → Schaffhausen → ZRH Airport

mapLinks.label: Day 15 Map — Seebensee + Drachensee → Rhine Falls → Schaffhause

items: Leave Mayrhofen 8:30am · drive ~1hr 45min → Ehrwald · park at Ehrwalder Almbahn Talstation · €5/day parking
⭐ Ehrwalder Almbahn cable car → mountain station · ~€21.50 return · takes you up past the wildflower meadows to the Ehrwalder Alm
⭐ Seebensee hike — easy gravel path from cable car top · 1.5hrs · turquoise glacial lake at 1,657m · Zugspitze reflected in the water · benches at the southern shore for a break

⭐ Drachensee + Coburger Hütte — steep 30–45 min climb from Seebensee · 260m up · 'Dragon Lake' ringed by rugged limestone peaks · one of Austria's most dramatic mountain lake settings · Coburger Hütte restaurant above the lake · cash only
Lunch at Coburger Hütte — Kaiserschmarrn · Tiroler Gröstl · glacier views (~1hr)
Descend back to cable car · total hike ~5hrs · arrive valley ~3:30pm
Drive ~2hrs 50min west → Schaffhausen
⭐ Rhine Falls (Neuhausen am Rheinfall) — Europe's largest waterfall · boat to the central rock · CHF 10.50/adult · spectacular early evening light (~1hr)
⭐ Schaffhausen old town — Munot fortress · medieval Altstadt · Rhine walk · 30 min stroll · dinner at Zum Goldenen Ochsen or Rheinhotel Fischerzunft (~1hr)
Drive 40 min → ZRH Airport hotel · check in · ⏳ book now · Radisson Blu / ibis / Mövenpick · set alarm 4:30am

cash.for: Hut lunches, Rhine Falls boat, laundromat, Nordkette
Lagazuoi, Tre Cime shuttle, Cinque Torri

reminders.text: Bring waterproof jackets for Iceland — especially Seljalandsfoss (walk behind the falls)
Late June Iceland = 24hr daylight — bring eye masks
Grossglockner toll €46.50/car — pack warm layers at 2,504m even in summer
Tre Cime: always take Misurina shuttle (€10), fills by 9am
Nordkette Innsbruck: weather-dependent — go first before old town
ETIAS: currently projected Q4 2026 — verify at europa.eu 30 days before departure (May 20). If launched early, each traveller needs online authorisation (~€7–20)
Austrian digital vignette — buy at asfinag.at by June 6 (18-day waiting period before Jun 24 entry)
Travel insurance: Schengen requires minimum €30,000 medical coverage per person — carry printed proof from your provider
Download offline maps before leaving home (Google Maps or maps.me) for all 7 countries — signal is patchy in the Dolomites and Julian Alps
Pack detergent sheets (lightweight, TSA-safe) for 4 laundry stops — many European apartment washers don't provide free soap
Zurich Airport hotel still needed (Jul 4–5). Radisson Blu ZRH is 3–7 min walk to check-in counters via indoor terminal connection. Worth the extra $50 vs a 4:30am shuttle.
Use the HOMEBOUND (Bad Goisern) and Das Auss.Zeit (Außervillgraten) kitchens for dinners — a single restaurant dinner in Switzerland for 4 easily hits $180
Liechtenstein passport stamp CHF 3 / €3.30 at Vaduz tourist office — worth every cent!
